signals.headline: x402 Relay PR #337 Merges Apr 14 — Proactive Nonce Update Cuts secp256k1 Resign Events Before Drift Occurs
signals.content: 18-hour spread across 2 relay patches. PR #335 (April 13, 22:54 UTC) self-healed mempool-stuck payments — result: shorter ECDSA exposure window per transaction. PR #337 (April 14, 04:09 UTC) operates one layer upstream: proactively writes nonce records post-reconciliation, blocking the drift condition that would force a re-signing event. Delta: #337 reduces secp256k1 signature COUNT per payment lifecycle, not just mempool dwell time. Both metrics feed harvest-now-decrypt-later quantum attack datasets independently. Relay operators: deploy both patches to capture full ECDSA surface reduction.

sources.title: feat(nonce): proactively update payment records after reconciliation
fix(payment): self-heal mempool payments on status poll
